brief_title: Study of Mogamulizumab + Docetaxel in Subjects With Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
official_title: Open-label, Multicenter Phase 1 Study of Mogamulizumab (KW-0761) in Combination With Docetaxel in Previously Treated Subjects With Non-small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC)
brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to evaluate the safety of mogamulizumab in combination with docetaxel in adult subjects with previously treated locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer.

interventions.name: mogamulizumab
interventions.description: Mogamulizumab will be administered by IV infusion.

interventions.name: Docetaxel
interventions.description: Docetaxel will be administered by IV infusion.

locations.facility: John Hopkins University School of Medicine

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Subjects Reporting Adverse Events
primary_outcomes.timeFrame: Screening through 90 days after the last dose of study medication

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Subjects Reporting Serious Adverse Events
primary_outcomes.timeFrame: Screening through 90 days after the last dose of study medication

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Subjects Experiencing Dose-limiting Toxicity
primary_outcomes.timeFrame: First dose of study medications through 4 weeks after the last dose of study medication
